title: Cuneiform Tablet #0373: Neo-Assyrian Marriage Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Assyrian period. Marriage Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records marriage contract matters typical of Neo-Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
